== Notes for [[Item:Q84185|Q84185]] ==

''From Banu 'Adi Clan of Quraysh Tribe.''

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Umm_Kulthum_bint_Asim

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Banu_Adi

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3143E87121EFBC189822EF79916C552A
geni:4616394220330026791

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
